name: Fix Your Credit Consulting
description_short: Fix Your Credit Consulting is a credit repair provider based in Valley Village, California. Rated 4.8/5 with 30 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Fix Your Credit Consulting is a credit repair provider serving clients in Valley Village, California. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 30 reviews, Fix Your Credit Consulting has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Valley Village area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a consultant, Fix Your Credit Consulting provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Valley Village, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Fix Your Credit Consulting operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Valley Village, California area who are considering Fix Your Credit Consulting should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
